description: Bill of debt. Dated: Tuesday, 28 Elul 5406 AM, which is 8 September 1646 CE. Rahamim b. Ya'aqov Qayyim and his wife Muhja bt. Yaʿaqov Qayyim acknowledge that they owe 15 Abū Kalb gurūsh (=esedi kuruş) to Aharon b. Elʿazar Rofeʾ Ḥazan (who also holds the communal title of Rosh Mishm[arah]). Their collateral is the right to the "Raḥamimāt" for several parshiyot. The signatures section shows a wide spectrum of scribal ability, ranging from Rahamim b. Ya'aqov Qayyim's erratic signature to the Aharon Miʿmār's well-trained hand. Miʿmār scribed a variety of documents like this one during the mid-seventeenth century but rarely listed himself as sofer. For an exception, see: Yevr. II A 1284 (PGPID 27498). MCD.
description_he: שטר חוב. תאריך: שלישי, כ"ח אלול 5406 = 8 ספטמבר 1646 לספירה. רחמים ב' יעקב קייים ואשתו מוחג'ה ב' יעקב קייים מאשרים שהם חייבים 15 גרוש אבו כלב לאהרן ב' אלעזר רופא חזן. הבטוחה שלהם היא זכות 'רחמימאת' לכמה פרשיות.
